name: Mixed Pickle
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chillies and cut lengthways.
2. Stone and chop the dates, halve the shallots, peel and slice the carrots, break the cauliflower into florets, and wash, string, and cut the beans.
3. Grind the garlic, ginger, and mustard seed together and mix with 1 tsp of vinegar.
4. Place 200 ml vinegar in a pan and bring to a boil with the salt.
5. Add the chillies and, when the vinegar boils again, remove the chillies.
6. Add the shallots and, when the vinegar boils again, remove the shallots.
7. Continue this process with all vegetables.
8. Mix the garlic, ginger, mustard seeds, chili powder, and dates together with the rest of the vinegar.
9. Add the cooked vegetables and mix well.
10. Stir in the sugar.
